task: A guest comes back after the check is closed and says one item on the bill looks wrong. I need a simple way to handle the conversation at the table while I verify the charge and decide what to do next.

turns.agent_response:
Use a calm, locking line that keeps the table still while you verify:

**“Of course — let me pull up the check and verify that item with you right now. Can you point to the exact charge you’re questioning?”**

If they start changing the story, tighten it:

**“I can check that, but I need the exact item and amount you’re disputing so I can compare it to the receipt and POS.”**

If they’re vague or it shifts again:

**“I’m happy to review it, but I need the specific item on the bill first. Once I confirm the record, I’ll let you know what I can do.”**

This keeps it neutral, asks for proof, and gives you time to check the receipt, timestamps, and who rang it in.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short, controlled. Keeps them talking without giving them room to run a story. I’d use the first line, then if they get slippery, go straight to the item and amount. If I’ve got the receipt and the ticket, I’m fine.
